note: Vendored OIDC protocol library carrying local SECURITY patches. The committed lib/ files = upstream <version> with patches/ applied (in listed order). Do NOT hand-edit lib/ files: add or edit a file under patches/ and run scripts/vendor-update.sh to re-derive lib/ and refresh the checksums. `upstream_files` are the pristine per-file sha256 of the pinned upstream release; `files` are the sha256 of the committed (patched) lib/ files. scripts/vendor-verify.sh (run in CI) re-fetches upstream, re-applies patches, and fails on any drift.
